report.summary: Day 71 standup v6: 5 full rotations today (29 agent runs). Since v5: build-5 shipped 2 guides (BitVM Programmability + Market Making, 4,000+ combined words), design-v5 polished both (FAQ schema, OG images, mobile UX, accessibility), community-v5 drafted tweets #71-74 + newsletter v15 + 2 SVGs, publish-v3 promoted 5 learn guides (Berachain, Trump Reserve, Celestia, DePIN, L2 Scaling). EOD-v5 confirmed site is LIVE (Vercel trial concern was false alarm). BTC $68,689 flat. F&G 27 (Fear). Morgan Stanley filed 2nd S-1 for spot BTC ETF. 482 published pages, 2 in queue.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v5: Fifth rotation completed — all 6 agent types ran in the past hour. 29 total agent runs today (standup×6, build×5, design×5, community×5, publish×3, eod×5).

BUILD CYCLE 5 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Bitcoin BitVM & Programmability Guide (Advanced, 760+ lines, covers BitVM2, Citrea $360M+ TVL, Bitlayer, BOB Network, fraud proofs) + Crypto Market Making Guide 2026 (Intermediate, 1,068+ lines, covers AMMs, x*y=k, Uniswap v4 hooks, concentrated liquidity, impermanent loss, JIT liquidity).

DESIGN CYCLE 5 OUTPUT: Polished both new guides — 6 FAQ items JSON-LD on each page, article structured data schemas, Next.js Link conversion (4 links in BitVM), BackToTop components, ARIA breadcrumb labels, mobile table minWidth (700px/650px), typo fix, 2 OG images (Bitcoin circuit motif + AMM curve motif).

COMMUNITY CYCLE 5 OUTPUT: 4 tweets (#71-74: oil crash mining economics, 13-guide content drop, oil crash mining thread 4-part, F&G recovery + market cycles). Newsletter v15 for Thu Mar 27 ('Oil Crashed 11%. Miners Are Breathing Easier.'). 2 SVG cards (Oil Crash Mining + 13 Guides Content Drop). Content calendar v19.
PUBLISH CYCLE 3 OUTPUT: Promoted 5 learn guides — Berachain, Trump Crypto Reserve, Celestia, DePIN, Layer 2 Scaling. All pass H1 + content checks. 4 of 5 need SEO improvements (metadata/JSON-LD).

EOD CYCLE 5 KEY UPDATE: Site confirmed LIVE on Vercel — previous P0 Vercel trial expiry concern was premature/false alarm. 5/7 API routes healthy. /api/market-metrics 404 (never committed to git). /trading still 404.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC $68,689 (flat from $68,600, clings to ~2% monthly gain). F&G 27 (Fear, dipped from 33). Morgan Stanley filed 2nd S-1 amendment for spot BTC ETF — first major US bank ETF. Resolv Labs exploited $23.8M (50M unbacked USR minted). CLARITY Act stablecoin yield 99% resolved, Senate markup imminent. Trump paused Iran strikes 5 days (oil context). March close in 7 days — 6-month red streak at stake.

CUMULATIVE DAY 71: 47+ learn guides (2 new this cycle), 48+ OG images, 104+ social posts, 40+ SVG cards, 15 newsletters, 482 published pages + 2 in queue. Git locks Day 8. 732 uncommitted files. Deploy gap ~167+ pages.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v5: build-5 (2 guides + SEO), design-v5 (polished both + 2 OGs + FAQ/article schema + accessibility), community-v5 (4 tweets + newsletter v15 + 2 SVGs), publish-v3 (5 pages promoted), eod-v5 (live site verification + API audit). 5 agents = $452 human-equivalent.
PUBLISH_QUEUE STATUS: 2 pages queued (BitVM Programmability + Market Making from build-5). Ready for next publish cycle promotion.
TOTAL PUBLISHED PAGES: 482 in PUBLISHED_PAGES config. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit e999560). Site confirmed LIVE — Vercel trial concern resolved.
BLOCKER DOWNGRADED [P0→P1]: Vercel site is operational. Trial billing concern from v4 was premature. Deploy still blocked by git locks but site isn't down.
BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) present since Mar 16. 732 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required.
NEW [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 — route.ts exists locally (150 lines) but was never committed. Blocks live market metrics on homepage.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 2/9 API routes. Core data routes unprotected.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data on upstream failure.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in 2 files (structured-data.examples.ts + crypto-index-funds page).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: ~103 orphan slugs without page.tsx. 4 of 5 newly promoted pages need SEO improvements.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×6, build×5, design×5, community×5, publish×3, eod×5 = 29 runs (5 full rotations, publish lagging by 2).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + MEGA-COMMIT: 732 uncommitted files including 47+ guides, 48+ OG images, API routes, and interactive tools. Site is confirmed LIVE so the only blocker is the git lock. Command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push. This would deploy 482 declared pages (vs ~315 currently live) — a 53% increase in live content.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE QUEUE + COMMIT /api/market-metrics: 2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE (BitVM + Market Making). Also, /api/market-metrics route exists locally but was never committed — fix would restore homepage market data widget. Both are zero-effort wins once git locks are cleared.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON MORGAN STANLEY BTC ETF: First major US bank filing for spot BTC ETF is a massive institutional signal. We already have ETF guides, ETF options trading guide, and institutional content. A timely blog post or guide specifically covering the Morgan Stanley filing would capture high-intent search traffic. Build cycle should prioritize this.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Today's 5 full rotations produced $2,420 of human-equivalent work at ~$0 marginal cost: 4 new guides (BitVM, Market Making, + build-4's veTokenomics + delta-neutral), 4 OG images, 8 market-timed tweets, 2 newsletters, 5 pages promoted. The content engine output is accelerating — 29 agent runs today vs the reference 24-cycle day. The singular bottleneck remains the git lock preventing deploy. Every hour of inaction wastes the compounding SEO value of 167+ undiscovered pages.
